system.description:
Prerequisite: Sorcery skill

The character gains a special intelligent animal bound to them by magic. The familiar is capable of speaking to its owner and is at least as smart as a young child. Familiars should have specific abilities based on species, at the Referee's discretion. A character may not have more than one familiar. This trait allows sorcerers to gain a familiar when they didn't receive one as a Mustering Out Benefit.
